allowed_tools.name: apify_linkedin
allowed_tools.pii_handling: stored in tenant DB only, SHA-256 hashed before any Meta CAPI call
allowed_tools.niche_notes: Target advisor-specific signal phrases. Prioritise posts mentioning AUM, book of business, independent practice, RIA, CFP.

allowed_tools.name: reddit_api
allowed_tools.pii_handling: username stored, never used for outreach — LinkedIn search URL pre-filled instead

allowed_tools.name: hubspot_contacts
allowed_tools.access_via: EventDispatcher only — never called directly from pod

allowed_tools.name: claude_api
use_cases: pre-call briefs (advisor context: AUM signals, practice type, pain category)
allowed_tools.sdk: none — direct HTTP POST via urllib.request

token_storage: Fernet AES-256 encrypted in platform_connections table — never plaintext, never in code
